raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Declaration of pragmatic intent framed as a spiritual discipline, committing the self to embodied action over abstract aspiration",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Incremental, observable actions possess greater causal efficacy for inner transformation than vague intentions",
    "The speaker possesses sufficient self-knowledge and agency to distinguish feasible changes from infeasible ones",
    "Vague resolutions inherently lack the structure required for genuine spiritual or metaphysical progress"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent; the binary contrast between observable action and vague resolution is logically consistent and presupposes a causal link between concreteness and realization",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The chosen changes must genuinely reflect deeper intentional alignment, and their observability must serve rather than substitute for non-physical growth",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The statement is used to reduce spiritual work to behavioral metrics alone, or to evade deeper non-physical inquiry by prioritizing only what can be externally tracked"
}
